sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: geonames-sy.zip
rawFiles.notes: Downloaded by data-automation collect-transport-geonames into an ignored local output directory.

transforms: Filter to Syria GeoNames rows with active railroad station, harbor, or port feature codes.
Append active railroad stations as rail_terminal records.
Merge broad harbor and port rows into existing UN/LOCODE seaport records when identity is clear.
Hold abandoned rail stations, airport rows, border posts, customs rows, heliports, and port subfacilities for review.
reviewNotes: Imported 28 active railroad station records and merged 3 broad harbor/port GeoNames identifiers into existing seaport records. Held 86 relevant rows for later review.
